chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1618 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 04.12.2021 3. For hearing of CMA No.7416/2019 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Record reflects that petitioner has already filed a withdrawal statement supported by his affidavit on 04.12.2021. In view of such statement, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
